notes: v345 — QUICK EXPORT BUTTON ON THE MAIN PAGE. There's now an ⬆ Export data button right on the main toolbar (next to 🖨 Print all shown and 📤 Share), so you can back up or move this device's saved market data in one click — no need to open ⚙️ Setup & data first. On a computer it saves the file straight to your Downloads; on a phone it opens the Copy / Save-file panel. Tip: if an exported file ever comes out empty, refresh the market data first (⚡ or ⬇ Download) so there's saved data to export, then use Save file. Hard-refresh to load v345. ALSO RECENT — v344 — ORDERS PLACED BEFORE THE MARKET OPENS NOW COUNT FOR TODAY. If you queue a buy before the ASX opens (before 10:00am Sydney) — say at 6am — it's treated as working from the opening bell, so if the share hits your price point today it fills today and shows in tonight's results. Orders placed during or after the session still start next trading day. Applies to 🎯 picks, manual limit buys, queued market buys, and the auto-pilot. v343 — Top 20 is a single-column ladder. v342 — fixed the table's colour seam. v341 — upgraded RSI to Wilder's standard. (Older notes live in the Owner's Manual changelog.)
